top_signals.title: The Trillion-Dollar AI Shockwave Nobody Is Ready For
top_signals.summary: The biggest investment opportunity of the AI era has very little to do with software or chips. The market has already priced both. The real story is power: who owns it, where it sits and how cheaply it can be delivered to AI workloads at scale. A small data center company that almost no one on Wall Street has heard of just answered all three of those questions in front of the entire industry. In May 2026, Bitzero Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:AIBZ) signed a binding letter for a 15-year lease with OneQode for the entire 110 megawatts at its Namsskogan,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold Drops Below $4,100 as Tech-Led Selloff Spurs Liquidation
top_signals.summary: Gold extended a decline, as a tech-led selloff on Wall Street prompted investors to cut bullion holdings to cover losses elsewhere in their portfolios.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ukraine’s Azov fighters were forced from Mariupol. Now they’re hitting back.
top_signals.summary: The 2022 defeat turned Azov into a symbol of endurance in Ukraine — and paved the way for its return.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
